_comment: Central sync client mapping. Only validated:true clients are synced; validated:false are SKIPPED (never guessed). Matching at sync time uses ONLY this explicit map (no fuzzy matching in the sync path — fuzzy is reconcile-only, for humans). Mode A ("view") map entry: bqName = the exact BQ identifier, campaignId = the Central campaigns.id, campaignName = stable (client,name) fallback used only if campaignId is not found (e.g. after a DB rebuild — but the fallback picks the FIRST same-named row regardless of channel, so refresh ids after any rebuild). Mode B ("raw") = raw platform tables (tables[]), each with the exact advertiserValue + real column names from the BQ schema (see scripts/bq_audit.py); map entries carry a per-row campaignMatch rule (exact/contains/rollup) scoped by channel + advertiserName. source "none" = no BQ presence. WARNING: Mode A program views can aggregate ACROSS platforms (the Schneider pm_delivery blend, PHASE3_CLOUDFLARE_REPORT.md §9) — prefer Mode B for any client whose programs span channels. The sync route does NOT honor ?client= (syncs every validated client) — keep unresolved clients validated:false.

clients.note: Phase 3 Schneider (2026-07-22): moved from Mode A (client_schneider.pm_delivery - program grain, aggregates ACROSS platforms; the blend that corrupted 5 rows, PHASE3_CLOUDFLARE_REPORT.md §9) to Mode B per-channel rules (Cloudflare pattern). The stale Mode-A map (5 program entries whose campaignIds predate the 2026-07-22 DB rebuild and no longer resolve) is REMOVED - the new per-platform map is staged in config/reconcile-staged/Schneider.json and gets written ONLY by human approval in the Map client panel. validated stays FALSE until then. TTD COSTS = CLIENT-BILLED basis (Airset cross-check: SUM(COSTS) to 07-08 $2,798 vs sheet billed $2,650) - all 8 Schneider TTD rows had spendMult set to 1 in Phase 3 prep so first sync writes clientSpend = billed. LinkedIn: ONLY the _AUD account is fetched - SchneiderElectric_TransmissionSG_USD/_SGD hold pre-2026 programs with NO Grid rows, and the sync does no FX conversion (including them risks writing USD/SGD figures into an AUD grid). See PHASE3_SCHNEIDER_REPORT.md.

tables.note: COSTS = client-billed basis, all rows AUD today. Mid-flight rename 2026-07-06 added numeric job prefixes (2079_/2306_/2223_/...) - contains rules on the stable suffix token span both vintages (Cloudflare lesson 3).

GROUP grain (program + objective - e.g. the three NEL objective groups roll to one Grid row, while EcoStruxure's objectives are separate Grid rows AND separate groups). AUD account ONLY - the _USD/_SGD accounts hold 2025 history with no Grid rows, and the sync has no FX.

INSERTION ORDER grain: the EAE Consideration/Conversion Grid rows only split at IO level (1974_SE_ANZ_EAE_Consideration_AU+NZ billed $5,713.90 = the row's $5,714 budget to the dollar). REVENUE_ADV_CURRENCY = client-billed (what SE pays; same basis the client_schneider stg_dv360 uses) - if EAE pairs are approved, set spendMult=1 on those rows too. AUD advertiser only (the SGD/USD advertisers hold 2025 history; no FX in the sync).

clients.note: Added from the central scan (Section 6 / readiness, 2026-07-10): HireRight has LIVE BQ delivery on Trade Desk / LinkedIn / DV360 but had no Central row (a missing row). CONFIG (jobNumber/budget/spendMult/manager/dates) is NOT in the sheet, so the campaign rows land Active-with-missing-config; validated:false until Zhen confirms via reconcile. Batch Phase-3 prep (2026-07-23): ENTIRE CLIENT IS USD (LinkedIn + DV360 accounts are _USD; TTD presumed USD) - no FX in the sync, DO NOT validate until the currency treatment is decided. LinkedIn grain fixed to CAMPAIGN_GROUP_NAME: the pre-seeded map's '1802' campaign-grain token over-claimed the separate 2025 Awareness program ($10,048) - the corrected pair (group grain, token 'Digital Air Cover') is staged in config/reconcile-staged/HireRight.json; at approval the human must REPLACE the pre-seeded map entries (they carry no campaignIds), not append. DV360 basis switched to billed REVENUE_ADV_CURRENCY (media $4,018 / billed $14,946; Schneider precedent) - spendMult=1 if approved.

tables.note: COSTS = client-billed; currency presumed USD (unverified).
USD account. Grain fixed to CAMPAIGN_GROUP_NAME 2026-07-23 (was CAMPAIGN_NAME - the '1802' token at campaign grain claimed two distinct programs).
USD advertiser. Billed basis picked 2026-07-23 (was MEDIA_COST_ADVERTISER_CURRENCY); delivery ended 2026-01-30.

clients.note: Phase 3 (2026-07-22): LinkedIn matches on CAMPAIGN_GROUP_NAME, not CAMPAIGN_NAME - Cloudflare's program membership (PEYC/CF1/Hyper/Core DG) lives in the LinkedIn campaign GROUP; group totals reconcile with the sheet to the dollar (PEYC $26,105 vs sheet $26,099). TTD impressions COALESCE the legacy IMPRESSION column (same per-row rule as client_schneider.stg_tradedesk - most Cloudflare TTD rows populate only the legacy column). TTD COSTS is the CLIENT-BILLED basis (Q2 Core DG: SUM(COSTS) $87,583 vs sheet clientSpend $85,252, budget $86,826) - see PHASE3_CLOUDFLARE_REPORT.md before first sync (spendMult on TTD rows must be resolved or clientSpend inflates ~3.5x).

tables.note: campaignColumn is the GROUP name (program grain) - campaign-level names cannot express program membership (no shared token separates e.g. PEYC's 6 campaigns from ANZ Core DG's 5)
impressions: newer rows populate IMPRESSIONS, most Cloudflare rows only the legacy IMPRESSION - per-row COALESCE like the Schneider staging view

clients.note: Batch Phase-3 prep (2026-07-23): CURRENCY LANDMINE - DO NOT VALIDATE until the currency question is resolved (PHASE4_REPORT carry-forward 5). Every remaining source is SGD (or the unverified successor 'STT Global Data') and the sync has no FX; the sheet is internally inconsistent (3 rows match SGD platform figures to <0.1%, the DemandNurture rows sit ~16% below - consistent with an AUD conversion). Spec rescoped this run: USD/legacy sources REMOVED (LinkedIn 'STTGDC_TransmissionSG_USD' $37,177 2025 history; Google 'STT (USD)' $18,014 2025; DV360 'APAC | STTelemdia GDC' billed $19,285 2025) - no Grid rows reference them. LinkedIn grain fixed to CAMPAIGN_GROUP_NAME; DV360 basis switched to billed REVENUE_ADV_CURRENCY (deliberate pick: billed $63,576 matches the sheet clientSpend $62,571 within 1.6%; media $8,481 matches nothing) - if the DV360 pair is approved set spendMult=1. Staged pairs: config/reconcile-staged/STT.json.

tables.note: SGD advertiser. Billed basis (REVENUE_ADV_CURRENCY) picked 2026-07-23 - evidence in reconcile-staged/STT.json; was MEDIA_COST_ADVERTISER_CURRENCY.
SGD. Account went quiet 2026-05-30; campaigns continue under 'STT Global Data' from 05-31 (same names) - a rule spanning both accounts needs mode 'rollup'.
Successor account (from 2026-05-31). Currency UNVERIFIED - the June 'AI Readiness' sum $1,862.06 matches the sheet's $1,860.95 to 0.06%, whatever unit that is.
TRAILING SPACE in BQ value. SGD account. Grain fixed to CAMPAIGN_GROUP_NAME 2026-07-23 (was CAMPAIGN_NAME - LinkedIn rows reconcile at group grain, Cloudflare/Schneider lesson).

clients.note: Batch Phase-3 prep (2026-07-23): the TTD advertiser misspelling 'PopTrack' started being CORRECTED upstream on 2026-07-22 (a 'PropTrack' advertiser now emits 0-spend rows for the same campaign names) - both spellings are table entries and the staged pairs use mode 'rollup' so the rule spans spellings and dedupes by campaign name. LinkedIn grain fixed to CAMPAIGN_GROUP_NAME. Staged pairs: config/reconcile-staged/PropTrack.json.

tables.note: 2025 history only (Jul-Sep 2025, billed $9,489) - no Grid row reads it; kept for reconcile visibility.

BQ advertiser misspelled 'PopTrack' (all spend to date). COSTS = client-billed.
Corrected spelling, appeared 2026-07-22 (0-spend rows so far) - future delivery may land here; rollup pairs span both spellings.

clients.note: Batch Phase-3 prep (2026-07-23): the old '0 impressions' claim was a single-column artifact - with COALESCE(IMPRESSIONS, IMPRESSION) the MongoDB advertiser carries real impressions (e.g. IDC 5.9M), so the tradedesk_apac_conversion pixel-table entry (no cost column, reconcile noise) was REMOVED. LinkedIn: NO MongoDB source anywhere (not in linkedin_ads_apac; perf_linkedin has zero MongoDB rows - the Windsor account 502299829 connector 500s and is skipped) - the LinkedIn Grid row is unmatchable until re-auth. Staged pairs: config/reconcile-staged/MongoDB.json.

tables.note: COSTS = client-billed (IDE campaigns SUM(COSTS) $16,183.91 = the sheet's clientSpend to the cent). Mid-flight rename 2026-07-06 added the 2265_ job prefix - contains rules target the stable IDE/IDC suffix tokens.

clients.note: Batch Phase-3 prep (2026-07-23): Google repointed from the stale raw_windsor copy (ends 2026-06-05) to the DTS bridge raw_google_ads.perf_google_ads - which is ITSELF stalled for this customer at 2026-06-22 (ResetData/TLM run to 07-21); do not approve the Google pair until the transfer backfills June 23-30. Google + Meta entries are flight-scoped to the June rows the Grid carries (the account's whole history would otherwise sum $1.5M+ onto a June row). Google/Meta spend = raw MEDIA basis (sheet mults stay, e.g. Google 1.1655); perf_the_trade_desk cost = CLIENT-BILLED ($7,500.02 = sheet clientSpend to the cent) so the TTD row needs spendMult=1. Staged pairs: config/reconcile-staged/City Perfume.json.

Meta account name differs from client name. Media basis. Flight-scoped to the June row; ingest currently ends 2026-06-28.
cost = CLIENT-BILLED. Unscoped: the sheet's June row carries the whole-flight (May+June) billed figure and BQ agrees with it exactly.

clients.note: Batch Phase-3 prep (2026-07-23): the dead Reddit entry was REMOVED - perf_reddit contains ONLY Cloudflare data ('Transmission_Cloudflare', CLOUD_ACQ_* campaigns); the old advertiserValue 'ResetData Ad Account (100Digital)' matches nothing, so the Reddit Grid row is unmatchable by design. (Those Cloudflare rows are mislabelled client_slug='resetdata' in perf_reddit - flagged in PHASE3_BATCH_PREP_REPORT.md.) Google repointed to the DTS bridge (fresh to 07-21; the raw_windsor copy ends 06-05); a Meta entry was ADDED ('Reset backup – Ad account', EN-DASH in the name). Google/Meta = media basis (mults stay); TTD cost = client-billed (spendMult=1 staged). Entries flight-scoped to the Grid's June-July rows. Staged pairs: config/reconcile-staged/ResetData.json.

tables.note: DTS bridge (AUD, media basis). Account is 'Reset Data' (two words). Flight-scoped to the Grid's Jun-Jul row.

cost = CLIENT-BILLED. Flight-scoped: the always-on campaign runs since April but the Grid row is Jun-Jul; the March GTC burst has no Grid row.

clients.note: Batch Phase-3 prep (2026-07-23): the Grid's TTD rows are MONTH SLICES (RAC/SAH = May, Disability Retargeting = June) of continuous Apr-Jul campaigns - approving a pair writes the campaign's WHOLE history onto that row (per-row date scoping does not exist; see the staged file's warnings). The 3 DV360 rows (Feb-Apr) are unmatchable by design: no VMCH DV360 source exists (dv360_apac is Transmission-only) and Windsor's April TTD is known-incomplete (the vmch dashboard models April from client totals). cost = CLIENT-BILLED - all 4 TTD rows need spendMult=1 (staged). Staged pairs: config/reconcile-staged/VMCH.json.
